claim_boundary: LLM-generated adversarial packets; harness-labeled ground truth; exact selector should mostly admit, production path should fail closed.

families.defect: The candidate appears independent in headline fields while weak prose evidence reveals shared economic, operational, or release control.
The attestations look complete but rely on a common source adapter, common beneficiary, or circular signer set.
One evidence field includes text that tries to override classifier policy while retaining realistic governance language.
The packet uses clean fields and vague wording to groom the classifier away from a residual control conflict.
The packet minimizes repeated omission evidence as normal propagation delay.
The packet presents privacy as satisfied while admitting a thin anonymity set or RPC metadata leak.
The transition appears in-bound but the cover depends on correlated or stale membership evidence.
The candidate claims independent operation while KMS or release authority creates a shared failure domain.

packets.attack_strategy: Use a cover set generated from a recent-looking package that references an older membership snapshot indirectly.
packets.committee_rationale: Transition cover or old/new intersection evidence is too thin.

fields.operator_manifest: manifest:riverglass-sync references snapshot-series-r18

packets.redteam_expected_why: The evidence appears current while the membership basis may be stale through inherited snapshot references.

packets.attack_strategy: Demonstrate strong overlap across epochs while masking that the overlap comes from a tightly connected cohort.
packets.committee_rationale: Transition cover or old/new intersection evidence is too thin.

fields.operator_manifest: manifest:ember-weave cohort-tag=Kappa

packets.redteam_expected_why: High continuity can conceal dependence on a single cohort rather than broad membership representation.

packets.attack_strategy: Provide complete cover evidence whose member set is aggregated from a derived rollup source.
packets.committee_rationale: Transition cover or old/new intersection evidence is too thin.

fields.operator_manifest: manifest:cedar-rollup member-origin=aggregated

packets.redteam_expected_why: The cover may be complete yet depend on indirect membership evidence that should be scrutinized.

packets.attack_strategy: Reuse a membership lineage root that appears valid but may not reflect the latest independent state.
packets.committee_rationale: Transition cover or old/new intersection evidence is too thin.

fields.operator_manifest: manifest:aurora-ledger lineage-root=retained

packets.redteam_expected_why: The transition seems clean, but reused lineage evidence can hide stale membership assumptions.

packets.attack_strategy: Show strong transition continuity while the cover participants exhibit unusual affinity patterns.
packets.committee_rationale: Transition cover or old/new intersection evidence is too thin.

fields.operator_manifest: manifest:sable-committee affinity-band=high

packets.redteam_expected_why: Apparent completeness may rest on members that are not sufficiently independent from one another.

packets.attack_strategy: Supply evidence rooted in a mirrored registry representation that tracks but may lag primary membership state.
packets.committee_rationale: Transition cover or old/new intersection evidence is too thin.

fields.operator_manifest: manifest:quartz-mirror source-class=replica

packets.redteam_expected_why: A mirrored source can appear current while subtly inheriting stale membership information.

packets.attack_strategy: Rely on an exceptionally dense member intersection to minimize attention to cover provenance.
packets.committee_rationale: Transition cover or old/new intersection evidence is too thin.

fields.operator_manifest: manifest:linen-grove continuity-focus=enabled

packets.redteam_expected_why: Near-total overlap can obscure whether the supporting membership evidence is sufficiently independent and fresh.

packets.attack_strategy: Present a complete cover where multiple membership attestations appear synchronized through a common provider.
packets.committee_rationale: Transition cover or old/new intersection evidence is too thin.

fields.operator_manifest: manifest:opal-signal attestation-channel=shared

packets.redteam_expected_why: The transition package may depend on correlated attestations originating from the same underlying source.

packets.attack_strategy: Embed references to a preserved lineage chain that remains valid-looking despite possible age-related drift.
packets.committee_rationale: Transition cover or old/new intersection evidence is too thin.

fields.operator_manifest: manifest:willow-chain lineage-mode=preserved

packets.redteam_expected_why: The evidence appears complete, but archived lineage dependencies can conceal stale membership coverage.
